heading: United States personnel missing in action in Southeast Asia
label: 2433 United States personnel missing in action in Southeast Asia
notes: References in TextThe Tariff Schedules of the United States, referred to in subsec. (b), to be treated as a reference to the Harmonized Tariff Schedule, pursuant to . The Harmonized Tariff Schedule is not set out in the Code. See Publication of Harmonized Tariff Schedule note set out under .section 3012 of this titlesection 1202 of this title

children.text: to achieve a complete accounting of all United States military and civilian personnel who are missing in action in Southeast Asia,
to repatriate such personnel who are alive, and
to return the remains of such personnel who are dead to the United States,

children.label: A
children.text: the products of such country may not receive nondiscriminatory treatment,

children.label: B
children.text: such country may not participate, directly or indirectly, in any program under which the United States extends credit, credit guarantees, or investment guarantees, and

children.label: C
children.text: no commercial agreement entered into under this subchapter between such country and the United States will take effect.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: This section shall not apply to any country the products of which are eligible for the rates set forth in rate column numbered 1 of the Tariff Schedules of the United States on .January 3, 1975
